textByHash.36293f0faec25a331a79288a5844f8c6b376351b: What? Who are you and why did you come here? It doesn't matter, leave now adventurer. While you still can.
textByHash.27508efa6bec035b69355eb6151c9959d4751237: What? How did you get in here? Who are you and why do you come here? It doesn't matter, you will not live long enough to tell anyone of our hideout!
textByHash.8fcede88fa2c52b6391ce92f66ea8590f9e78de3: What? An intruder? HERE? How did you get in here? You must leave! NOW!
textByHash.1a07bcc040050b22008ddce5fa76400135f17041: Leave me alone, can't you see I'm busy? We have a lot to do preparing for the imminent return of Lord Hazeel
textByHash.4672400bfce2682690220a99c7a642219b5a78f4: Well, it's always good to have a new recruit. Soon we shall retrive Hazeels' scroll and the ritual to revive him can begin!
textByHash.e401be752c50eb71cad8ddfc8342bd9f7159fd03: Well hello! Until we have retrieved the scroll of Hazeel we cannot resurrect our master. You must find it and bring it to us.
textByHash.7eb16821089a5c14d42f0654851ca06a06a1bcd2: Welcome back adventurer! Since you have brought us the scroll of Hazeel we can now perform the resurrection ceremony! Soon our master will return!
textByHash.51a2e51df5182c37809ce158420a3d873b01f55f: You have no place here! Leave now, before someone makes you!
textByHash.d61e877a9c8dd540b4df2454003807c0bebaf866: I cannot talk right now. Lord Hazeel will soon be back with us and I have many preparations to make.
textByHash.c6c873399b13a6a702454d77cc9c144c78b8645c: The adventurer returns! Glory to you for your efforts in bringing about the return of Lord Hazeel!
